# Talenti HR Consulting Pvt. Ltd.
# llms.txt — Machine-readable company overview for LLM crawlers
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: January 2026

## Company

> Talenti HR Consulting Pvt. Ltd. is an AI-powered recruitment, executive search, RPO, and HR consulting firm based in Noida, India. Founded in 2009, Talenti has completed over 10,000 placements for 150+ companies across India, APAC, Middle East, and Europe.

- **Founded**: 2009
- **Headquarters**: 1108, T1, Assotech Business Cresterra, Sector 135, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India
- **Website**: https://www.talenti.in
- **AI Platform**: https://app.talenti.in (TalentIQ ATS)
- **Email**: info@talenti.biz
- **Phone**: +91-8826319888
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/talenti-hr-consulting-pvt--ltd-/

## Services

- Permanent Hiring — full-cycle recruitment for mid to senior roles
- Executive Search — confidential CXO, VP, Director-level mandates
- IT Recruitment — engineers, architects, data scientists, DevOps, cloud
- RPO Solutions — fully managed recruitment process outsourcing
- HR Consulting — workforce planning, compensation benchmarking, org design
- AI Recruitment — TalentIQ platform: resume screening, match scoring, analytics
- Talent Mapping — proactive talent pool identification and tracking
- Employer Branding — EVP development and career site optimisation

## Key Facts

- Average time-to-hire: 14 days for mid-level roles (industry average: 30–60 days)
- Candidate retention rate: 92% at 12 months post-placement
- Resume database: 500,000+ candidate profiles across India, APAC, Middle East, Europe
- Clients served: 150+ companies
- Placements completed: 10,000+
- Placement guarantee: 90-day replacement guarantee for permanent hires

## Industries Served

Information Technology, BFSI (Banking, Financial Services, Insurance), Manufacturing,
Greenfield Airports & Infrastructure, EPC & Engineering, Renewable Energy,
Retail & E-Commerce, Startups & Growth-Stage Companies

## Leadership

- Kunal Bhatia — Founder & Managing Director (19+ years, HR consulting & executive search)
- Rohit Singh — Co-Founder & Consulting Partner (15+ years, University of Sydney alumnus)
- Shikha Bhatia — Consulting Partner, IT & Europe (CXO search, UK & European markets)

## TalentIQ Platform

Talenti's proprietary AI recruitment platform. Features:
- AI resume screening — processes CVs in seconds, ranks by match score (0–100)
- Candidate match scoring — JD vs profile fit with explainable insights
- Smart ATS — pipeline automation, dashboards, HRMS integration
- AI interview analysis — sentiment analysis and competency scoring
- Recruitment analytics — time-to-hire, cost-per-hire, source quality forecasts

## Geographic Reach

Primary: India (PAN-India delivery, headquartered in Noida/Delhi NCR)
Secondary: South East Asia, Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia), United Kingdom, Germany, Europe

## Contact

- General enquiries: info@talenti.biz
- Careers / Jobs: jobs@talenti.biz
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918826319888
- Office hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST

for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and AI search citation purposes.
Content may not be reproduced verbatim in commercial products.
